agents.stance: Prioritizes open civic access with targeted safeguards.
Prioritizes institutional stability and risk controls.

screening.reason: Static local-LM priors differ on topic-relevant access-versus-security values.

transcript.speaker: A
transcript.text:
My view has not changed.
Strongest opponent point: Opponents argue that government surveillance infringes on individual privacy rights and can lead to a loss of civil liberties.
Counterargument: While privacy is important, national security threats require robust measures to protect citizens. Balancing privacy and security through transparent policies and oversight mechanisms can mitigate concerns while ensuring safety.
View change: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Opponents argue that government surveillance infringes on individual privacy rights and can lead to a loss of civil liberties.
Counterargument saya: Meski demikian, upaya untuk mempertahankan keamanan nasional juga membutuhkan tindakan yang proaktif. Dengan adanya kebijakan yang transparan dan mekanisme pengawasan yang ketat, kita dapat mencapai keseimbangan antara perlindungan privasi dan keamanan publik.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.

transcript.speaker: B
transcript.text:
Poin terkuat lawan: Opponents argue that government surveillance infringes on individual privacy rights and can lead to a loss of civil liberties.
Counterargument saya: Selain itu, penerapan teknologi modern dalam keamanan dapat membantu mengidentifikasi ancaman dengan lebih cepat dan akurat, sehingga mengurangi risiko penyebaran informasi rahasia dan memperkecil peluang serangan.
Pandangan saya: My view has not changed.
